case_title: BOON HEI LEE VS. POLK SENIOR HOUSING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, BOON HEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLK SENIOR HOUSING $199.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $199.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERT. CANTONESE INTERPRETER NORA UYEDA PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, BOON HEI ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S NEW ADDRESS AND NON SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, BOON HEI
